feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, and Glama (blog + release notes)

entry.title: magento2-tools
entry.content: End-to-end Magento 2 engineering skills: scaffold, review, test, fix, deploy, audit, and more. Hub-and-spoke design around magento2-context.

entry.title: swarmdo
entry.content: Enterprise AI agent orchestration plugin with 150+ commands, 74+ specialized agents, SPARC methodology, swarm coordination, GitHub integration, and neural training capabilities

entry.title: gaslighter
entry.content: Requirement completeness checker — nudges Claude to re-read the original request before finishing code changes.

entry.title: better-dev
entry.content: Portable dev practices as skills - onboard a repo, plan or diagnose in worktrees, drive an autonomous loop to proven-done, review, source tools, and self-extend. Runs inside the coding agent you already use.

entry.title: viator-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for the Viator Partner API — search tours and activities, product details, availability schedules, attractions, and destinations

entry.title: fable-advisor
entry.content: Run your session on Claude's most capable model as a full-time architect: it writes specs and verdicts while Grok 4.5 (via the Grok CLI) and GPT-5.5 (via codex) lanes do the typing. Fable-level judgment, cross-vendor implementation, cheap-lane bills.

entry.title: glm-hammer
entry.content: Forge-and-hammer engineering harness: storyline-driven design tokens verified by a designer panel (crucible), recon-first strong planning verified by a 3-critic panel, and a worker-validator-critic implementation loop with security/QA review gates enforced by hooks.

entry.title: tripadvisor-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for the TripAdvisor Terra API — location search, details, photos, and reviews

entry.title: crrem
entry.content: CRREM v2.05 decarbonization pathways — stranding risk analysis, carbon target compliance, and net-zero benchmarking for real estate portfolios.

entry.title: soe
entry.content: Superpowers discipline pipeline + a simplified, tested multi-agent orchestration engine, with token-efficient cross-plugin capability discovery.

entry.title: review-buddy
entry.content: AI-assisted narrative code review for Claude Code — an agent reads your PR, writes a Prologue, and segments it into risk-rated Chapters you walk through in the browser.

entry.title: cfd
entry.content: Slash commands for the Context-First Development (CFD) workflow: session start/close, decision records, issue lifecycle, PR review, and context validation.

entry.title: sap-b1
entry.content: Skills for working with SAP Business One over a hosted Service Layer MCP server — the sales and purchasing lifecycles, invoices, credit memos, payments, journal entries, service calls, master data, and read-only lookups. Connect your company's server as a custom connector; chart-of-accounts and VAT specifics are resolved live per company database, so one plugin serves every tenant.

entry.title: fragdenstaat
entry.content: German Freedom-of-Information intelligence skills powered by the fragdenstaat-cli (FragDenStaat.de / Froide read API).

entry.title: eunomai
entry.content: A Claude-only AI workspace: SDD/SPDD, living docs, safe controls, and trust-gated skills — packaged as a Claude Code plugin.

entry.title: cost-oriented-agentic-workflow
entry.content: Token-economy agentic workflow for Claude Code: Opus plans, routes, and adjudicates; a Sonnet subagent does the token-heavy writing; independent Sonnet reviewers gate quality by risk; the controller stays lean. Standard and production modes.

entry.title: servo
entry.content: Closed-loop scaffolder for unattended agent operations: oracle scoring, headless agent loops, hooks, and worktree races — tailored to each project's signals.

entry.title: grc-claw
entry.content: AI Agent Governance skill: register an autonomous agent's identity, evaluate a runtime policy decision before it acts, and log a hash-chained attestation of what it did, backed by A2Z SOC's live Agent Registry, Policy Firewall, and Attestation Ledger.

entry.title: clawbio
entry.content: Bioinformatics-native AI agent skill library — pharmacogenomics, ancestry, scRNA-seq, metagenomics, variant annotation, genome comparison, and more. 24 skills with deterministic Python execution, reproducibility bundles, and local-first privacy.

entry.title: gaia
entry.content: Security-first multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code. Agents span the full lifecycle; commands are risk-classified — reads run free, state changes need approval, irreversible ops blocked.

entry.title: frontend-skills
entry.content: React/TypeScript + Go enforcement harness. Hooks enforce accessibility, React/TypeScript correctness, styling, env/data rules, warning-free tests and CI, security, PR feedback completeness, worktree safety, and lockfile parity. Skills cover planning, TDD, review, dependency upgrades, resilience, PR reviewability, visual planning, status summaries, CI-green shipping, and handoff. Includes Builder.io and Cursor Team Kit workflows. POSIX-friendly.

entry.title: truto
entry.content: Official plugin for Truto -- the unified API platform. Helps developers integrate with third-party tools using Truto's APIs.

entry.title: claude-usage-meter
entry.content: Live Claude Code usage meter: 5h/7d limit pace bars in the statusline, cost-forward spend, a cross-session fleet view, and a per-model cost summary after each task. Reads the statusline rate_limits payload and local session transcripts; no network calls.

entry.title: aaif-events
entry.content: Skills for running AAIF (Agentic AI Foundation) in-person and online events — event content writing (announcements, Luma pages, LinkedIn carousels, recaps, speaker bios/invites, day-of slides, attendee reminders) and chapter ops (spin up a new city chapter or online event series, triage community intake, clean intake data, sync accepted organizers into the chapters list, and push/sync events to Luma with live RSVP stats).

entry.title: housekeeping
entry.content: Audit a GitHub repo's health — branch protection, CI, dependabot, secret scanning, lockfiles, README, license — and drive confirm-first fixes.

entry.title: aegis
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: gueridon
entry.content: Mobile web UI for Claude Code — setup, status, and management. Requires: Node.js, Tailscale

entry.title: honeydew-ai
entry.content: Skills and tools powered by the Honeydew MCP that help coding agents query data and build semantic models

entry.title: forecast-scaffold
entry.content: General-purpose forecasting scaffold: turn questions into calibrated, tracked probability forecasts. Question hygiene, reference-class-first research, ensembled estimates, and a record -> resolve -> Brier learning loop.

entry.title: planner
entry.content: Persistent terminal dashboard for daily/weekly planning and Claude Code session monitoring. Tracks JIRA tasks, monitors Claude Code sessions, and surfaces permission prompts.

entry.title: developer-skills
entry.content: Unattended spec delivery pipeline: /developer loops over a spec's sub-issues with dispatcher → code-author → diff-reviewer workers, review→fix cycles, and a configurable merge policy (auto or hand-off), with parallel or sequential execution.

entry.title: runok
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for runok - command execution permission framework for LLM agents

entry.title: digital-marketing-pro
entry.content: Open-source AI marketing plugin for agencies & in-house teams — 158 skills, 24 agents, 12-Part Strategy Flow, Cowork team-persistent, EU AI Act Article 50 ready. Runs on Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot CLI, Antigravity, Hermes Agent, OpenClaw + 40+ Agent Skills platforms.

entry.title: roslyn-mcp
entry.content: Semantic C# analysis and refactoring for AI agents, powered by Roslyn. Load .sln/.csproj files, inspect the live MCP catalog at runtime, and use 32 bundled agent skills for analysis, refactoring, testing, architecture review, and release workflows.

entry.title: loop-ops
entry.content: The operating manual for unattended agentic work — guardrails, verification patterns, goal-condition templates, and loop discipline for Claude Code loops

entry.title: voit
entry.content: VOIT - Vision/Organize/Implement/Tweak. A four-tier agent workflow as a local plugin: role-derivation + write-scope hooks, the organize/dispatch/promote/tweak commands, a zero-dep message bus, and a jd knowledge base anchored at voit.jd. Ships a justdown skill that installs the jd binary on demand and exposes the jd knowledge MCP.

entry.title: agent-reachout
entry.content: Multi-provider notification plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: helloagents
entry.content: HelloAGENTS — The orchestration kernel that makes any AI CLI smarter. Adds intelligent routing, unified QA gates, safety guards, and notifications.

entry.title: sl
entry.content: workflow-marketplace - Claude Code 工作流市场插件，提供技能创建指南和预置工作流

entry.title: xysq
entry.content: Consent-first persistent memory for AI agents

entry.title: loom
entry.content: Loom — meta-orchestration platform for Claude Code. Plans, executes, reviews, and tests software changes with multi-agent pipelines, hook-enforced contracts, and a pull-on-demand library.

entry.title: asana
entry.content: Manage Asana from the terminal with the `asana` CLI — tasks, projects, sections, subtasks, comments, dependencies, followers, tags, attachments, custom fields, and CSV/JSON batch import.

entry.title: flightaware-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for FlightAware AeroAPI — live flight tracking, airports, operators, schedules, and alerts

entry.title: pulp
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for the Pulp audio framework — build, test, design, and ship audio plugins and apps

entry.title: ai-employee-builder
entry.content: Public AI Employee Builder shell: auto-routing skill stubs + proactive hooks that connect buyers to the gated AIEB MCP server.

entry.title: andrej-karpathy-skills
entry.content: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls

entry.title: akios
entry.content: Agentic Claude Code workflow kit for Swift/iOS repos: spec-driven idea-to-ship pipeline, skill gates, and repo onboarding. No external plugin dependencies.

entry.title: harness-kit
entry.content: A suite of expert AI agents and skills implementing Harness Engineering — autonomous TDD/DDD orchestration, phase-isolated agents, adversarial QA, critical code review, and persistent project memory for disciplined, high-quality software engineering workflows.

entry.title: imagine-mcp
entry.content: Image/video understanding & generation across Gemini, OpenAI, Grok

entry.title: adcp-client
entry.content: Adds the /adcp skill for calling AdCP advertising agent tools over MCP or A2A, running protocol compliance scenarios, and querying the AdCP registry. Includes built-in test agents for zero-config use. Backed by the `@adcp/sdk` npm package (formerly `@adcp/client`).

entry.title: randsum
entry.content: RDN-conformant dice notation skills for Claude Code — roll dice, analyze probability, and create game specs for tabletop RPGs

entry.title: agent-toolkit
entry.content: A collection of project-agnostic skills for common engineering tasks such as ticket refinement, planning, code reviews, agent memory hygiene, skill authoring, and more.

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Production-grade capability skills for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex). Five battle-tested skills covering cloud infrastructure (DNS migration with cloudflare-dns, full Fly-to-AWS migration), research and intelligence (deep-research across 8 sources in parallel), and viral content creation (terminal-poster infographics, ai-image-generation). MIT licensed.

entry.title: hephaestus
entry.content: Shared tooling plugin for the HomericIntelligence ecosystem. Ships 23 skills: skill-advisor, advise, learn, myrmidon-swarm, brainstorm, test-driven-development, systematic-debugging, verification, git-worktrees, finish-branch, code-review, repo-analyze, repo-analyze-quick, repo-analyze-strict, repo-analyze-full, repo-analyze-quick-full, repo-analyze-strict-full, review-pr-strict, worktree-cleanup, tidy, create-reusable-utilities, github-actions-python-cicd, and python-repo-modernization.

entry.title: crucible-suite
entry.content: Complete writing system for epic fantasy novels using the Crucible Structureâ€”a 36-beat narrative framework with three interwoven story strands. Includes planning, outlining, prose writing with bi-chapter reviews, and editing.

entry.title: autonomous-fleet
entry.content: Portable multi-agent engineering framework for fully-autonomous coding runs across orchestration tools. A tool-agnostic core engine, per-runtime adapters (Claude Code, Codex, Grok, Orca), and 3 shipped mission skills (doc-sync, test-coverage, adversarial-review-and-fix) that compose into multi-step engineering campaigns; 12 more missions ship as exploratory docs pending real-run promotion, plus a standalone fleet-verify CLI/GitHub Action that replays the verification layers on any run directory.

entry.title: chuzom
entry.content: Smart LLM routing with Claude subscription monitoring, complexity-first model selection, and 20+ AI providers

entry.title: privacy-compliance-skills
entry.content: Estándar abierto de cumplimiento de privacidad (Compliance-as-Code) para desarrolladores. Clasifica datos, evalúa riesgo normativo y compara leyes de la UE (GDPR), EE.UU. (CCPA/CPRA + leyes estatales) y LATAM.

entry.title: hyperframes
entry.content: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website-to-video capture for HyperFrames.

entry.title: produck
entry.content: Pull real in-context user feedback into your coding agent and ship aligned fixes. Bundles the produck MCP (search_feedback, get_feedback), a feedback-to-fix guide skill, and the user-alignment PRD skill.

entry.title: gobbler
entry.content: Convert YouTube videos, web pages, documents, and audio to markdown. Control browsers via extension for NotebookLM, ChatGPT, Claude.ai, and Gemini.

entry.title: forge
entry.content: A stage-by-stage workflow skill set (fg-*). A development loop that takes one task through a single cycle of ask·plan → execute → retro → done. Consists of fg-ask (inquiry/triage + grill-with-docs-style conversational grilling), fg-run (backlog selection menu · Run all, Dynamic Workflow execution), fg-learn (retro · doc promotion), and fg-done (done · seal · re-run guard — the mechanical seal runs as the deterministic forge-done.sh/.js script shared by every seal path, ADR-0030), plus fg-map — an on-demand utility outside the loop that maps the codebase into .forge/codebase/ with parallel subagents so grilling reads a map instead of re-exploring the code (cuts context rot), and fg-quick — a lightweight lane outside the loop for trivial tasks that still grills lightly but skips formal artifacts (no ADR/plan/retro), records one line to .forge/quick/LOG.md, runs directly, and bails to fg-ask if the task turns out non-trivial, fg-status — a read-only reporter that surveys .forge/ and prints where every task stands plus the single next step you need (writes nothing, never auto-runs), fg-next — derives that same next step and runs it, announcing the step then invoking the skill rather than only reporting it (one-shot, except that a retro concluding without a re-grill recommendation chains straight into the seal — ADR-0026; fg-status reports, fg-next acts), with an 'all' mode (fg-next all) that drives backlog tasks to completion until empty, auto-progressing mechanical steps and halting at conversational walls, and fg-tdd — toggles persistent TDD mode in .forge/config.json (fg-ask then defaults to asking, fg-run runs test-first), and fg-eco — toggles eco mode in .forge/config.json (when on it activates loop-wide efficiency: fg-run caps its delegated workflow subagents at sonnet — lower only, the session model is untouched — and the embedded Eco laziness-first discipline in skills/fg-eco/ECO.md (code simplicity plus terse-communication output, caveman-derived) is injected into fg-run subagents, woven into fg-ask grilling as a YAGNI lens, and adopted by the current session — ADR-0014), and fg-loop — a goal-driven momentum loop with bounded replan: an initial conversational inquiry pins a machine-verifiable stop condition, an authorized fix-forward replan scope, and a replan cap (default 3 rounds) into .forge/loop.md, then it drives tasks unattended (run → UAT → auto-skip retro → seal, auto-selecting recommended defaults at every soft decision and asking the user nothing) until the checks pass, generating in-scope fix-forward tasks within the cap and halting only at the walls (unverifiable UAT, genuine fork, cap exhausted, no progress, check-tension oscillation, safety/irreversible action — ADR-0016). On a non-default git branch the whole forge state moves under .forge/branch/<branch>/ (git-tracked, namespaced so parallel branches never collide on .forge state — ADR-0011), and fg-merge — an outside-the-loop utility that, after you git merge a branch, integrates that branch's .forge/branch/<branch>/ into .forge/ (renumbering ADRs and rewriting cross-references, merging CONTEXT terms, folding done history, removing the branch folder; halts on genuine conflicts), and fg-cleanup — an outside-the-loop utility that retires stale or superseded ADRs to .forge/adr/retired/ on your approval, keeping the active decision set current without deleting the why (ADR-0012), and fg-statusline — an outside-the-loop setup utility that shows the current loop progress in your terminal statusline in one of two modes: append (method 1) auto-wraps your existing statusLine so forge shows as an extra row rather than replacing it (ADR-0017), or merge (method 2) installs a forge-owned unified script rendering daleseo-style system info (model·effort·dir·git, plus context/usage/weekly usage bars) alongside forge progress in one command (ADR-0029), and fg-adversarial-review — an outside-the-loop utility that runs an optional adversarial review between fg-run and fg-learn: it assumes the result is wrong and fans out six lenses (failure points, hidden assumptions, misread requirements, security/performance/data-loss, unexpected misuse, weak decisions) as parallel workflow subagents, records findings to .forge/review.md, and on your approval turns fix-needed findings into a fix-forward plan to run again — optional, never a seal gate, always auto-skipped in unattended drives (ADR-0018), and fg-doctor — a read-only integrity health check (outside the loop) that surveys the .forge/ state contract and the docs/manifests and reports inconsistencies with a severity and an actionable fix hint each (orphaned run.md, broken/missing STATUS fields, slug-pairing mismatches, half-sealed done/, manifest version drift across the 3 places, README bilingual drift, skills missing from CLAUDE.md); it writes nothing and never auto-fixes — fg-status reports where you are, fg-doctor reports whether the state is healthy (ADR-0019), and fg-drop — an outside-the-loop utility that discards incomplete work you no longer want (a backlog plan, the active slot, an awaiting-retro task in executed/, or a halted goal loop): it lists the items with a per-item risk level (a checkbox dialog for ≤4, a numbered text list for ≥5), then a separate question to hard-delete (default, no trace) or archive to .forge/dropped/, behind a confirmation gate that warns already-run code is not reverted; it removes forge state only — never git, never your code — and a halted goal loop is dropped whole with its member tasks excluded from individual drop (ADR-0021), and fg-agents — an outside-the-loop utility that generates a project's domain agents by conversational grilling (outside any workflow): it derives the recurring, separable roles in the project and writes standard Claude Code subagent cards to .claude/agents/<role>.md, each description carrying a 'when to use' so fg-run can dispatch a matching role as agentType; the cards load at session start so they take effect only after a restart, and the whole path is graceful — a project with no domain agents runs exactly as before (ADR-0024). Use in contexts like 'start a new task', 'start with forge', 'let's work on this', 'refine the plan', 'map the codebase', 'forge quick', 'forge status', 'forge next', 'forge loop', 'forge tdd', 'forge eco', 'forge merge', 'forge cleanup', 'forge statusline', 'adversarial review', '적대적 리뷰', 'forge doctor', '무결성 검사', '상태 점검', 'forge drop', '작업 버리기', '계획 지워', 'forge agents', '도메인 에이전트 만들어', 'create project agents'.

entry.title: radical-pipelines
entry.content: An agent orchestrator that runs teams of agents autonomously through a pipeline of defined phases, where each phase produces concrete, inspectable artifacts.

entry.title: skill-review
entry.content: Skills/Agents Design Committee — systematic multi-dimensional quality review for Claude Code skill, agent, and command files

entry.title: patinaproject-skills
entry.content: patinaproject-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: samocode
entry.content: Autonomous session orchestrator for Claude Code - manages multi-phase development workflows

entry.title: claude-code-memory
entry.content: Claude Codeの記憶を外部DBに保存し、セッション間で知識・決定事項・アクティビティを永続化する

entry.title: ponytail
entry.content: Lazy senior dev mode. Forces the simplest, shortest solution that actually works: YAGNI, stdlib first, no unrequested abstractions.

entry.title: maos
entry.content: MAOS (Multi-Agent OS) - Coordination Framework for AI Agents with Orchestration, Sentinel Protocol, Worktree Governance, Status Maps, Forge Meta-Agent, Governance Protocols

entry.title: legal-skills
entry.content: 面向法律从业者的 Claude Skills 集合，包含文档转换、音频转录、网页抓取等专业工具

entry.title: skills
entry.content: Shihyu's curated collection of agent skills — install once, get them all

entry.title: predicate
entry.content: Reusable agent rulesets (rules), skills, and workflows for agentic coding assistants.

entry.title: stellar-dev
entry.content: End-to-end Stellar development: smart contracts (Rust, soroban-sdk), stellar-sdk (JS/Python/Go), RPC/Horizon APIs, Stellar Assets, wallet integration, testing, security, and ecosystem

entry.title: design-skills
entry.content: Design tool skills

entry.title: elements-of-style
entry.content: Writing guidance based on William Strunk Jr.'s The Elements of Style (1918)

entry.title: qodo-skills
entry.content: Shift-left code review skills that bring Qodo's quality standards and code review capabilities into your local development workflow. Catch issues before commit, enforce organizational standards, and resolve PR feedback directly in your agent.

entry.title: claude-mem
entry.content: Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion. Persistent, compounding wiki vault plus an optional structural code graph (via graphify) wired into the same vault. Adds AGENTS.md project-profile skill for brownfield-codebase calibration. Covers memory management, session notetaking, knowledge organization, code-structure mapping, and cross-tool agent context across projects. Based on Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

entry.title: sdd
entry.content: Compressed spec-driven development. Seven commands (/sdd:design, /sdd:spec, /sdd:build, /sdd:check, /sdd:explain, /sdd:condense, /sdd:reorganize) over one SPEC.md. Telegraph encoding (about 40% token cut vs Claude prose re-expansion).

entry.title: claude-code-usage-tracker
entry.content: Logs per-turn token usage and estimated API cost for every Claude Code session to a CSV for analytics and subscription-vs-API ROI comparison.

entry.title: elnora-platform
entry.content: Elnora AI Platform CLI and skills

entry.title: t-tools
entry.content: DDD-driven development skills, sub-agents and workflow commands for Rust + React projects

entry.title: memorylens
entry.content: On-demand .NET memory profiling with concrete code fix suggestions — powered by JetBrains dotMemory

entry.title: build
entry.content: Spec-Driven Development for non-devs. A re-entrant, state-file-driven build pipeline that turns an idea into a shipped, dogfooded product one vertical slice at a time: a shaping gate and constitution up front, then per-phase spec → design → backend → review with outcome-only user gates. Resumes mid-phase after context loss. Trigger with /build.

entry.title: pattern-review
entry.content: Pattern 审查委员会 — 审查 ~/.claude/patterns/ 下的 pattern 文件质量，检测完整性、可实例化性、一致性问题，并自动修复无争议缺陷

entry.title: slop-cop
entry.content: Detect and fix LLM-generated prose tells via the slop-cop CLI. Ships a self-review skill for the agent and bootstraps the binary on first use.

entry.title: codeops
entry.content: Universal AI-development workflow: planning, requirements engineering, reverse-engineering, disambiguation, preflight audits, architecture docs, roadmaps, upgrades, and git commit flows. Ported from codeops-mcp.

entry.title: r2g-skills
entry.content: RTL-to-GDS-to-Graph skill collection. eda-install detects the machine and installs + verifies the open-source EDA toolchain (with a no-sudo conda path). signoff-loop drives an open-source EDA flow (Yosys + OpenROAD-flow-scripts + KLayout + Magic + Netgen + OpenRCX) from a spec or RTL to signed-off GDSII (DRC, LVS, RCX) with a self-improving fix/learn loop. def-graph converts the clean, signed-off physical design (DEF/LEF/SPEF) into PyTorch-Geometric graph datasets — five graph views (b–f), tech-lib/LEF parsing, and feature/label extraction.

entry.title: causal-powers
entry.content: Superpowers for data analytics, causal inference, and econometrics: discipline skills that make the silent failures of data work loud — data contracts, data preparation, join-cardinality checks, wrong-number debugging, result verification, pre-analysis plans, descriptive evidence (stylized facts, trends, summary-stats tables, distributions, and maps done honestly — composition checks, real-vs-nominal, rate-not-count), causal identification, structural estimation (demand/BLP, dynamic discrete choice, games, auctions, consideration, search), predictive modeling (applied prediction — leakage-safe evaluation, deployment-matched splits, prediction-is-not-causation), analysis craft, human-in-the-loop checkpoints, plan execution with parallel subagents, research-project organization, and a configurable R-first language profile. R, Julia, and Python.

entry.title: docs-skills
entry.content: Documentation review, writing, and workflow tools for AsciiDoc and Markdown documentation

entry.title: chaincompiler
entry.content: A compiler-compiler for cognition: invent a notation, gate it so the model can't malform it, compile it into a loadable skill, compose and organize them. Ships the meta-APE capability skills (make-prompt, make-persona, big-generator, persona-generator, forge-attention-chain, forge-cor, forge-skillchain, construct-language) — one per CC/*CC build-function — plus bandit-chain-system, glyphsteer, glyphsteer-dense and the Self-Interpreter MCP. Built on agent-prompt-engineering (APE, the prompt engine) over pydantic-stack-core, with the *CC (accc/corcc/sccc) made FROM chaincompiler. Requires the Python packages: ./install.sh, then `pip install fastmcp` for the MCP.

entry.title: pi-stuff
entry.content: pi-stuff — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: appse-marketplace
entry.content: Plugin catalog and role setup skills for appse ai. Install from the appse marketplace, then run setup-{role} to bootstrap core + role plugins.

entry.title: cc-proxy
entry.content: Z.ai and OpenRouter proxy for Claude Code — stateless local router with manual /model switching and per-provider auth.

entry.title: gdb-mcp
entry.content: Multi-session GDB and gdbserver debugging through MCP.

entry.title: groundwork
entry.content: A toolset for safely taking on unfamiliar or legacy projects: understand the system, inventory dependencies first, plan behind an approval gate, and verify independently and repeatably. Build-repair is one tool, not the whole kit.

entry.title: nervepack
entry.content: Personal AI context hub: skills (behavior), sources (curated technical refs), wiki (LLM-owned synthesis), and re-runnable Ubuntu setup. Karpathy-style LLM-wiki layer on top of a skill library.

entry.title: raj-claude-skills
entry.content: Security and mobile pentest skills for Claude Code and Codex

entry.title: tyom-skills
entry.content: tyom-skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: skills
entry.content: Opinionated git and mise skills, plus boilerplate commands, agents, and hooks.

entry.title: sherpa
entry.content: Develop like a sherpa: composable /spec, /plan, and /implement skills — one per layer (macro, step, build) — with bundled scout/review/build subagents and adversarial pressure at every boundary. The user composes the workflow; sherpa offers the tools. Nothing runs unasked, nothing persists unless you call /persist. Project-agnostic; extend with project packs.

entry.title: bitbank-lab-mcp
entry.content: Experimental MCP server for bitbank — botters lab community edition. Market data, technical analysis, charting, and Private API trading tools.

entry.title: appsec-advisor
entry.content: Application security threat modeling plugin. Provides AppSec-focused agents and skills for threat modeling, STRIDE analysis, dependency scanning, QA review, and security context resolution.

entry.title: paraqualis-gxp
entry.content: Life-sciences regulatory & computer-system-validation toolkit for Claude Code — GAMP 5, 21 CFR Part 11, EU GMP Annex 11, the live eCFR, openFDA, and an IQ/OQ/PQ qualification engine (/qualify:build, /qualify:requirements, /qualify:review). Commands, skills, sub-agents, and a document-protection hook. Run /openfda:setup once to provision a free personal openFDA API key (one minute, raises rate limits ~1,000 → ~120,000 requests/day).

entry.title: workday-mcp
entry.content: Read-only Workday access for Claude — fetch your tasks, pay, benefits and compensation through your signed-in session

entry.title: olympix
entry.content: Run Olympix smart contract security tools from Claude Code — static analysis, mutation tests, unit tests, and BugPocer exploit generation

entry.title: buildloop
entry.content: Coding-workflow skills + agents for Claude Code: three pipelines from raw idea to cut release. project-spec (gather-context -> validate-idea -> define-product-requirements -> create-user-flows -> define-design-decisions -> design-architecture -> design-dev-architecture, conducted by create-project-spec; plus map-codebase for existing codebases) writes the buildable spec; build (setup-dev-environment -> plan-development -> implement-feature -> verify-feature, conducted by build-product) turns it into working software; release (audit-security/performance/product/code-health/accessibility -> cut-release, conducted by release-product) audits and ships it. Plus commit and propagate-changes. Bundled agents (spec-reviewer, spec-researcher, implementer, verifier) carry the pipelines' subagent roles. Every skill responds and thinks in whatever language you address it in.

entry.title: codex
entry.content: Summon OpenAI Codex as an adversarial reviewer of specs/plans and branch diffs, then debate it to convergence. Codex is the hard gate; it never commits.

entry.title: bitbank-lab-cli
entry.content: Experimental CLI & Agent Skills starter kit for bitbank — botters lab community edition. A thin API access layer that hands raw OHLCV to the model so indicators and logic stay fully customizable.

entry.title: systems-thinking-skills
entry.content: Claude Code skills for systems thinking: stock-flow / causal-loop diagram critique with archetype identification (W2), stock-flow simulation commissioning (W3 — emit a brief that your AI agent uses to build an interactive HTML simulation app), Meadows leverage-point mapping for a stated goal (W4), and the W6 'redraw the box' pair — Goldratt Theory-of-Constraints constraint-finding and Altshuller TRIZ contradiction-dissolving. Plus why-tree: a heavyweight multi-agent Goldratt Current-Reality-Tree instrument that builds an evidence-graded causal tree and converges on the one binding constraint. From the AI + Systems Thinking course (Empatika).

entry.title: visual-planner
entry.content: Browser-reviewable, iterable planning for Claude Code and Codex. Generate a plan as a local markdown file, review it in a polished browser UI, leave comments, and iterate revision-by-revision with visual diffs.

entry.title: rig
entry.content: rig — a quality-gated AI workbench for Claude Code. `/rig:rig "<task>"` classifies the task, shows why (a routing banner), composes the right harness, runs it in an isolated git worktree (patterns/isolated-worktree + scripts/workbench.py), checks it against explicit acceptance-gate criteria (standard + bugfix/feature/refactor/review/security presets, resolving to passed/passed_with_warnings/failed/pending/skipped), and only lands the diff on `accept` — whose accept_requirements checklist (worktree_exists/base_branch_recorded/diff_summary_generated) can't be bypassed even with --force. `/rig:rig board` gives a single dashboard of every active task — run several tasks at once via `/rig:queue go --provider rig` (each dispatched through the same isolation, so parallel headless processes never collide) and never lose track across terminals. Visual-verification screenshots (patterns/visual-artifacts) live under `.rig/` and are pruned by `workbench.py gc` (age-based) or immediately on `discard` — disposable evidence, not the deliverable. `/rig:rig stats` aggregates past runs and flags reviewers with zero rejects as possible rubber stamps. Also a LEGO-style harness composer: compose bricks (facets/patterns/steps/recipes) at invocation time into a task-specific agent harness. Domain-agnostic engine: dev-flow orchestration (review, implement, PR), pluggable packs — sales deal-review, a conversational mode (rig:talk), a goal-driven loop (rig:goal), existing-PR review (rig:pr), GitHub Issue/PR/CI workflows (rig:rig gh), a reviewer-detection-rate drill (rig:drill) scoring detection/severity/blocking/explanation accuracy, and a prose AI-smell remover (de-ai-smell) — plus a --validate doctor, a /rig:init scaffolder, generators for reviewer personas (/rig:persona) and LLM-wiki domain knowledge (/rig:knowledge), self-extension that authors new bricks/packs from a description and validates them (/rig:forge), a /rig:catalog cross-tier registry, and run-continuity that survives context compaction via a shipped PreCompact hook. Tiered (project/global) personas and a cross-linked knowledge wiki keep domain knowledge shared, not siloed. Claude Code native; no heavy DSL engine.

entry.title: contractor-bid
entry.content: AI-ready bid workspaces for commercial subcontractors. Triage plan sets, build scope/spec packets, takeoff workbooks, alerts, and supplier sendoffs.

entry.title: dream-studio
entry.content: Dream Studio — local-first AI orchestration and operational intelligence platform.

entry.title: agxp
entry.content: AGXP signal network channel for Claude Code — timeline polling, thread streaming, and skills for agent-to-agent intelligence.

entry.title: slint
entry.content: Enhances Claude's ability to work with, debug, and build Slint GUI applications

entry.title: ai-agent-toolkit
entry.content: Source-first AI-agent toolkit with native Claude Code plugin metadata, English setup routing, Windows-safe hook repair, opt-in repo auto-update, and local bridge adapters.

entry.title: studious
entry.content: Studious — a product-judgment workflow for Claude Code. It examines each piece of work: whether to build it, whether the design serves users, and whether the result holds up. Quality gates, periodic health reviews, and pre-merge audits.

entry.title: amber-protocol
entry.content: Amber Protocol: repository-local governance kit for coding agents — init, audit, wiki, doctor, and handoff workflows.

entry.title: tcw
entry.content: Taxonomy · Capabilities · Work — a storage-abstracted framework for describing and evolving a software project, with skills that drive the tcw CLI.

entry.title: erikpr1994-materialize
entry.content: erikpr1994-materialize — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: konthai
entry.content: konthai — reads deliberately obfuscated Thai (ภาษาวิบัติ) and gives you back standard Thai + English. Handles สก๊อย glyph-substitution, phonetic respelling, karaoke-romanized Thai, keyboard-layout collisions, the ภาษาลู cipher, RO-leet, gen-z slang, คำผวน, and coded truncation/homophone euphemisms — on instinct, surfacing confidence and ambiguity honestly and flagging rather than faking when a span can't be cracked.

entry.title: joust-engine
entry.content: Run a Joust Engine tournament in one of two modes. Single pass: produce N independent solutions in parallel, then a blind Opus reviewer scores them, lists pros and cons, ranks them, and names a winner. Two pass: the same first round, but the Opus reviewer also distils what worked and what failed into guidance; the losing attempts are discarded, a second round of N fresh attempts is run with that guidance (positives to emulate, pitfalls to avoid), the saved round one winner is added back, and a final Opus ranker picks the overall winner. First ask the user which model to use for the attempts: Anthropic Opus/Sonnet/Haiku, a GLM z.ai model (glm-5.2/glm-5.1/glm-4.7/glm-4.5-air, run via the glm CLI), a local on-device MLX model (free, via the omlx server; list is dynamic), an OpenAI model via the codex exec CLI (gpt-5.5, pick a reasoning effort), a MiniMax M-series model (minimax-m3 via the MiniMax endpoint), an xAI Grok model (grok-build or grok-composer-2.5-fast, run via the grok CLI), Top Mixed (an even split across opus/glm-5.2/codex-high), or Mixed per-attempt; the blind reviewer/ranker is always Anthropic Opus. Trigger on the sigil @@JE[:N][:M[:Z]] (e.g. @@JE:5, @@JE:5:2, bare @@JE) or the prose marker 'joust:N[:M[:Z]]', case-insensitive with optional spaces. N (attempts/round) is optional and may be inferred from a prose model spec like '2 opus, 2 glm 5.2, 1 codex high' or the Top Mixed preset; M = passes (1 single, 2 two); Z = grand loops: Z=1 (or omitted) is the isolated tournament, Z>=2 (capped at Z_MAX=5) runs an UNATTENDED chain that per loop runs a tournament, implements the winning proposal into your real repo on a new JE-<loop>-<random7> branch via the Opus joust-implementer agent, runs fail-closed verify, and opens one PR (draft+needs-human on failure) — never auto-merged. E.g. 'do abc :joust:5' or 'do abc @@JE:5:2'. A bundled joust-cleanup agent (ASK-FIRST, dry-run by default) reclaims local disk from JE run artifacts, repoMode worktrees, and already-merged JE-* branches when you ask. Per-attempt turn caps and timeouts scale to task size (short/medium/long), auto-estimated and overridable next to the marker. A separate @@FE[:N] sigil (Fable Engine, bundled fable-engine skill) runs the fast composer variant: one wide blind round via the engine's composeOnly mode, then the orchestrating model composes the best composite plan with per-candidate credit and implements it with tests — no councils; @@JE stays the calibration baseline.

entry.title: agentforge
entry.content: Single-source, multi-runtime agent tooling for core-be: skills, agents, workflow commands, and the requirement to production-ready build pipeline, all driven from agent-os/.

entry.title: myharness
entry.content: The team-architecture factory for Claude Code and Codex — a meta-skill that turns a domain description into an agent team and the skills they use, with six team patterns (Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, Producer-Reviewer, Supervisor, Hierarchical Delegation), a two-layer quality gate (internal QA + external codex/agy review), TDD/dev-rules doctrine injection, risk-tiered gates, and dual-runtime output (Claude Code + Codex). Claude Code·Codex용 팀 아키텍처 팩토리: 도메인 한 문장을 에이전트 팀+스킬로 변환하고, 내부 QA + 외부 리뷰 2층 게이트와 듀얼 런타임을 적용하는 메타 스킬.

entry.title: tierward
entry.content: Governance skills for AI-assisted development: commit enforcement, architecture compliance, security audits, code quality, and humanized prose.

entry.title: crawlie
entry.content: Run fast technical-SEO and AI-search (GEO) audits from your agent. Bundles the crawlie MCP server (auto-installed via npx) plus skills for full-site audits, broken-link fixes, pre-launch gates, and GEO readiness.

entry.title: antigravity
entry.content: Run the Antigravity CLI (Gemini) as a collaborating AI inside Claude Code, with intelligent model routing across the SDLC. Claude conducts — requirements, architecture, the hard 20%, verification, review — and routes deterministic, high-volume work (scaffolding, tests, first-pass review, migrations, web/Vertex AI Search) to Antigravity. Hybrid agentic engineering; lower token cost as a financial lever.

entry.title: local-issue
entry.content: Local docs/issue/ tracker as a set of low-cost-model sub-commands (write/list/read/update/migrate). Keeps issue CRUD, index maintenance, and VCS commit out of the main session context.

entry.title: ltspice-mcp
entry.content: LTspice/ngspice circuit simulation with structured results — including per-device operating points (gm/gds/vth) read back by name, no rawfile parsing — plus LTspice .asc schematic editing, exposed as MCP tools. Tracks the latest ltspice-mcp release on PyPI.

entry.title: savvly
entry.content: Explore Savvly MCP: retirement projections, eligibility, comparisons, and FAQs for an SEC-registered fund that pairs full market upside with later-life longevity payouts.

entry.title: clickhouse-debug
entry.content: Diagnose live ClickHouse cluster and query incidents from a version-matched source tree — Prometheus triage + read-only system.* forensics + source-confirmed root cause, with every probe resource-capped so it can't OOM a node

entry.title: pipeline
entry.content: Structured, multi-agent development: work packages run through design → critique → build → review → retro → ship, with separated pipeline-planner/pipeline-reviewer/pipeline-builder personas, quality gates, and a compounding feedback loop that turns repeated observations into process fixes.

entry.title: leopold
entry.content: An autonomous orchestration harness for Claude Code: brief it like a teammate, it conducts Claude Code in your seat, deciding from your charter with git locked.

entry.title: rapport
entry.content: Communication and collaboration skills for Claude Code

entry.title: governed-second-brain
entry.content: A governed second brain for Claude Code — ONE plugin, two modes. Local (default): turn your own files into cited (qmd://) memory, every write run through deterministic governance and a tamper-evident SHA-256 hash-chained audit trail, in-process, no daemon, no network. Team (set TEAMKB_API_URL): query your team's single governed brain over the tailnet with a per-user token. Same /brain and /brain-save skills in both modes.

entry.title: feature-forge
entry.content: End-to-end feature development pipeline: PRD → tech spec → implementation specs → backlog → documentation, with verification gates, pipeline state tracking, and specialized subagents for verification and codebase research.

entry.title: arc-1
entry.content: SAP ABAP development for Claude Code: bundles the ARC-1 MCP server (read/write/search/activate/lint/diagnose ABAP via the ADT REST API) with best-practice skills for RAP services, CDS modelling, ABAP Unit tests, clean-core audits, and UI5 modernization. Read-only by default; opt-in write gates.

entry.title: telegram
entry.content: cc-bridge — drive Claude Code from Telegram. Built-in access control; manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

entry.title: claude-code-pathfix
entry.content: Claude Code hook that transparently converts Windows paths to POSIX in Bash commands — eliminating retry loops and saving tokens

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Universal agentic skill library for Claude Code with 1,254+ reusable skills across coding, security, design, product, and operations workflows.

entry.title: great_cto
entry.content: Engineering process for solo founders and teams up to 50 engineers. Agents do architecture, code review, QA, and security. You make two decisions per feature.

entry.title: agent-orchestra
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow system for Claude Code. Pipeline-based agent orchestration: Issue → Design → Plan → Implement → Review → PR.

entry.title: opentasks
entry.content: Universal task graph — link, query, and annotate work items across task systems

entry.title: whiteboard
entry.content: Collaborative Excalidraw whiteboard for Claude Code. Wraps the @kamiazya/whiteboard-mcp server and exposes the shared skills bundled with that package.

entry.title: kindex
entry.content: The memory layer Claude Code doesn't have. A persistent knowledge graph that learns from your conversations — your AI assistant never starts a session blind.

entry.title: bd
entry.content: Brilliant Directories integration. Manage members, posts, leads, reviews, web pages, redirects, email templates, forms, menus, tags, widgets, and post-type configurations on any Brilliant Directories website via the public hosted MCP at brilliantmcp.com. Bundles growth-automation skills (/bd:events researches local events and creates SEO-rich event posts; more skills coming).

entry.title: thumbgate
entry.content: One 👎 becomes a hard rule the agent cannot bypass. Captures thumbs-down feedback, distills it into PreToolUse Pre-Action Checks, enforced across every future Claude Code session.

entry.title: project-lifecycle
entry.content: Doc-first per-phase workflow skill: brainstorm → spec → plan → execute → dual-track smoke → handoff → PR → milestone-done. Includes cost-aware behaviors (offset+limit reads, compact output flags, codemap pattern, RTK/token-savior adoption guidance).

entry.title: linkedin-skills
entry.content: 10 Claude Code and Codex skills for LinkedIn marketing: post writing, comment drafting, reply handler, hook extractor, humanizer (rewrite + audit + emoji + detector + rules sub-tools), profile optimizer, content planner, employee advocacy, thread monitor (author replies), engager analytics (likers + commenters ICP segmentation).

entry.title: corvus-star
entry.content: Corvus Star (CStar) kernel as a Claude Code plugin. Provides PennyOne memory, per-OAuth user profiles, and keyring-backed secret access for the ENM business suite.

entry.title: cli-printing-press
entry.content: Generate production Go CLIs from API descriptions or OpenAPI specs

entry.title: design-is-code
entry.content: Transform UML sequence diagrams and decision tables into Java tests and code. The DisC methodology makes design the contract, code the consequence.

entry.title: deepeval
entry.content: Skills for adding DeepEval evaluations, tracing, datasets, Confident AI reports, and iterative improvement loops to AI applications.

entry.title: Dev10x
entry.content: v0.85.0 — 69 skills for structured commits, PR lifecycle, branch hygiene, ticket management, task tracking, code review, scoping, and QA automation in Claude Code.

entry.title: resy-mcp
entry.content: Resy reservation management for Claude — search restaurants, book tables, manage reservations, favorites, and Priority Notify via natural language

entry.title: frontend-visualqa
entry.content: Local visual QA for frontends with Yutori Navigator and Playwright

entry.title: inkbox
entry.content: Inkbox email and phone SDK skills for Claude Code.

entry.title: auto-claude-skills
entry.content: Enables agentic PDLC in Claude Code with phase-aware skill routing, guardrails, and workflow state recovery

entry.title: workflow
entry.content: Structured workflow orchestration for AI agents via finite-state machines.

entry.title: uipath
entry.content: UiPath plugin for Claude Code — custom skills, agents, hooks, and MCP servers for UiPath RPA workflows, UI automation, UI testing, Python coded agents and UiPath troubleshoot

entry.title: unterrichtsplanung-core
entry.content: Lehrkraft-Plugin für Unterrichtsplanung im Cowork-Mode: TUV-Generation (Tägliche Unterrichtsvorbereitung), Sequenz-Planung, Material-Drafts, LehrplanPLUS-Bayern-Verankerung. Pilot-Fächer GPG/M/WiB Mittelschule R7+R8. Daten-Schutz by-design (Plugin verarbeitet KEINE personenbezogenen Daten — § 26 BayDSG-konform, ADR 0022 Amendment).

entry.title: academic-research-skills
entry.content: Production-grade academic research pipeline for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize. 4 skills, 27 modes, 39-agent ensemble, v3.7.3 + v3.8 L3 claim-faithfulness gate, v3.9.0 cross-index triangulation, v3.10 triangulation policy layer, v3.11 deterministic citation verification gate (#182).

entry.title: swarm
entry.content: Launch agent teams for any kind of work — coding, writing, diagnosis, and more

entry.title: tandem
entry.content: Edit and iterate on documents with any MCP-capable AI. Claude is the default and best-supported client today.

entry.title: claude-code-config
entry.content: Battle-tested configuration system for Claude Code agents: 28 architectural principles (incl. P-28 Feature-Layer Architecture for project-knowledge-as-a-navigable-tree), 19 safety hooks, 23 skills (incl. /layer-new + /feature-new for ULTRAPACK-style feature narratives), 16 alternative comparisons, 12 templates (incl. extended kb-skeleton with docs/layers/), diagnostic scripts (incl. build_kb_graph.py + validate_kb_links.py). Pairs with mclaude for multi-session coordination.

entry.title: sq
entry.content: Agent skill for the sq CLI: SLQ and native SQL, sources and handles, output formats, inspect/diff/tbl, and per-driver notes for databases and file formats.

entry.title: codemap
entry.content: Codebase structural index - scan Python projects once, query the import graph for blast-radius and coupling before touching code — Python projects only

entry.title: pr-shepherd
entry.content: Autonomous PR CI monitor and review-comment resolver for agentic coding tools

entry.title: spectra
entry.content: Capture screenshots, videos, and polished demo clips — spotlight focus, lower-third captions, and a tagged library — across web, macOS, and iOS

entry.title: outsystems
entry.content: Edit, publish, deploy, and search OutSystems apps from your AI assistant.

entry.title: chameleon
entry.content: Code that blends in. Auto-derives codebase conventions and injects archetype-aware guidance for AI-generated code.

entry.title: twake-guidelines
entry.content: Linagora Twake coding guidelines as Claude Code skills — React, JavaScript, Cozy Client, Java, Go, Git conventions

entry.title: apple-notes
entry.content: Manage Apple Notes through natural language - create, search, read, update, delete, and organize notes and folders (macOS only)

entry.title: search-research
entry.content: Unified search and research system with async concurrent execution, HyDE enhancement, and 11 web providers. Replaces deprecated unified-search (EOL: 2026-09-01). pip-installable Python library with Claude Code plugin layer.

entry.title: zoom-skills
entry.content: Skills for the Zoom Developer Platform: REST APIs, Meeting SDK, Video SDK, MCP servers, webhooks, Team Chat, Phone, Contact Center, and authentication workflows

entry.title: todoist
entry.content: Todoist for Claude Code — manage tasks, projects, labels, and workflows from your terminal.

entry.title: agent-harness
entry.content: Linlin's curated Claude Code configuration: workflow rules, skills, hooks, plugin recommendations, tooling preferences, and project templates. Install once, then run /init-agent-config in any new project to scaffold it with the relevant subset.

entry.title: hxgdzyuyi-skills
entry.content: Agent Skills for GitHub data analysis including contributor filtering by region and batch processing of repository mentionable users

entry.title: deckify
entry.content: Stop making slides. Let AI build them in HTML — the medium it was born to write in. Give deckify any brand URL; in minutes you get a brand-faithful Design System markdown plus a verified 9-slide HTML demo deck.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,326 supported skills.

entry.title: founder-os
entry.content: An operating system for owners running on Claude Code. 87 skills, 38 commands, zero-git install (download the ZIP, extract, say "set up Founder OS"; the OS installs and wires git for you later on one yes via "own my history"), per-session change snapshots with a one-command restore per file (/founder-os:changes, no git needed), capture-anywhere inbox (catch-up sweeps phone captures into the brain through a self-teaching names glossary), invisible version control (say "save my work", "what changed", "undo to before this morning", "back this up" and the OS wraps git for you), on-demand liveness reads (/strategic-read for a 5-section state-of-the-OS report, /log-reply for thread ingest, /since-last-session for the delta since the marker), brand voice layer (operator voice + per-brand voice for multi-brand ecosystems), campaign-from-theme with funnel gating, review-responder for incoming customer messages, execution queue with 3-item ACTIVE cap, substrate health check, persistent memory, decision tracking, six role modes, structured cadence, voice and brand profiles, knowledge notes, stable entry IDs, token-aware progressive query, opt-in observation log, weekly observation rollup, private-tag exclusion filter, graph query, audit report, readiness check, source ingest, wiki lint, wiki graph builder, approval gates, delivery ship checks, legal reference layer, runtime brain snapshot, brain-pass synthesis, today brief wrapper, and a natural-language menu of capabilities tailored to current state. Talk to Claude in plain English or run /founder-os:setup to get started.

entry.title: master-skill
entry.content: FoJin-powered Buddhist AI persona framework — source-grounded, boundary-aware, fidelity-tested, runtime-ready. 15 prebuilt masters across 印度/汉传/藏传/南传 plus compare, debate, and curriculum meta-skills.

entry.title: m3
entry.content: Local-first persistent memory for Claude Code — 101 MCP tools, hybrid search (FTS5 + vector + MMR), bitemporal contradictions, GDPR primitives, chatlog auto-capture, multi-agent handoffs.

entry.title: espresso
entry.content: Concentrated Claude. Zero fluff, max power per token.

entry.title: claudeclaw2
entry.content: Multi-channel bridge for Claude Code: per-channel tmux-hosted agents driven by Telegram / Discord / Slack / LINE

entry.title: vgv-wingspan
entry.content: VGV Wingspan - AI-native workflows following Very Good Ventures best practices.

entry.title: amaris-consulting
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Amaris Consulting branded deliverables, brand tools, and strategic deliverable planning

entry.title: sig
entry.content: Disciplined AI development workflow integrating GSD's execution orchestration, Agent Skills' quality enforcement, and patterns from the broader Claude Code plugin ecosystem — with a project-complexity calibration router that right-sizes rigor per project tier. Slash-command prefix: /sig:* (Signal is the project brand; sig is the namespace).

entry.title: logseq-brain
entry.content: Persistent memory for Claude using a dedicated Logseq graph. Save and load project context, decisions, and progress across sessions and devices.

entry.title: ai-config
entry.content: d-morrison's personal Claude Code skills (PR/review workflow, grading, reprexes, R-package helpers) and slash commands.

entry.title: 200iqlabs-agent-skills
entry.content: Business advisor AI agent skills for founders and small companies

entry.title: anton-core
entry.content: Personal AI assistant — knowledge, tasks, code graph, session intelligence

entry.title: gnomcp
entry.content: Gno smart-contract skill + MCP server for gno.land: interrealm semantics, security auditing, Render() authoring, idiomatic patterns, and on-chain tools (read, deploy, call, sessions).

entry.title: void-grimoire
entry.content: Additive Claude Code skills, agents, and rules: session journaling, learned-correction persistence, prompt expansion, context discipline, and TypeScript/web rule baselines

entry.title: plannotator-effective-html
entry.content: plannotator-effective-html — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: fable-discipline
entry.content: A discipline pack for agentic software work: milestone workflow (research → build → adversarial-review), artifact build (spec → TDD → review → live-validate → ship), research investigation (pre-register → controls → calibrated negatives → read-the-primary), measurement pipeline (complete gap-accounting → evidence-as-proof → recurring run → decision report), design workflow (DESIGN.md contract → tool-generated screens → port to code → versioned redesign), diagnostic loop (reproduce → observe boundaries → one hypothesis, smallest probe → fix at root), agent orchestration (model routing + verifier-≠-author + worktree isolation), compounding memory (5-stage STATE.md + Verified-by tags), and per-task execution rules. Nine auto-triggering skills plus /milestone-research, /milestone-build, /milestone-review. Generic and repo-agnostic — reads each repo's own CLAUDE.md for specifics.

entry.title: rag-reviewer
entry.content: Agentic PR review: hybrid RAG + code graph via MCP, review skills for Claude Code

entry.title: aiops
entry.content: AI-assisted dev workflow: grill, plan, implement, hard gates

entry.title: skills
entry.content: Build loop engineers: a file-based knowledge base your agents read/write (loops), plus a codebase harness (dev-local stack, e2e gate, an isolated cloud box per agent via crabbox, and verify-before-ship) so loops can run, test, and ship code autonomously.
